# PR Template (Specflow8)

## Feature Scope
- Feature IDs: F-XXX
- Title:
- Change goal:

## Traceability
- Related Plan: F-XXX
- Related Tasks: T-XXX
- Related ADR: ADR-XXX

## Stage
- Stage: specify | plan | tasks | decide | implement | review

## Verification
- [ ] specflow8 analyze --mode transition --enforce-commit-trace
- [ ] Critical tests/checks passed
- Evidence:

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk:
- Rollback:

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Document boundaries remain intact
- [ ] Cross-doc trace links are valid (F/T/ADR)
- [ ] Commit messages follow commit-trace template
